title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned about Claude's expanding role in AI development, including code writing, review, and experimentation. OpenAI has issued similar warnings about frontier AI governance risks. The video frames these developments as evidence of early-stage AI self-improvement where AI systems handle more of the work in building next-generation AI.
